{{Infobox location
| name = Tomb of Scrolls
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Tomb of Scrolls]] is a location containing a main [[library]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Tomb of Scrolls]] contains a main [[library]] that is a tall, vaulted cathedral to knowledge.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Tomb of Scrolls]] is a location where [[Mul’Tanak]] stretched out her arms.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c5" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
